'''Venslas Beeli''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]], operating originally in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] before relocating to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Beeli's origins were obscure. He signed up as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] crewman in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] when there was no legitimate commercial work, but found he was a natural at surviving the deadly, rough-and-tumble life of piracy. He became infamous as a two-pistol armed, screaming boarder, and this reputation helped him build up contacts and knowledge.
[[File:Venslas_Beeli2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Venslas Beeli wielding one of his pair of BlasTech DL-6H Heavy Blaster Pistols]]
After his original crew broke up, he rose to be the head of a splinter group, the [[Solar Terrors]]. The Terrors operated using up-armed [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] and would attack [[Transport/Legends|transports]] traveling alone. Bereli funneled part of their profits into bribes amongst port and law enforcement officials, making their work easy.<ref name="Orbit" />

Over time, the Terrors acquired a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] named the [[Zahtjav (starship)|''Zahtjav'']], an [[Etti Lighter|''Etti''-class light transport]] named the ''[[Javiq]]'', and the ''[[Pyesmev]]'', which was modeled on a [[Imperial Customs Corvette|light corvette]]. However, all this success brought the eye of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Orbit" />

After three months, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lev Kepzen]] of the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Feral (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Feral'']] tracked down Beeli and his base. Beeli was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] following his prompt [[Capture of the Solar Terrors|surrender]].<ref name="Orbit" />
[[File:Venslas_Beeli_ships.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Beeli's ships]]
When Captain Imperial [[Vocis Kenit|Kenit]] learned of Beeli's capture, he concocted a plan. He reassembled the Terrors and their ships, placing Beeli in charge. He gave the pirate a simple mission: find, draw out and destroy or corner the Rebel frigate ''[[Far Orbit]]''. Beeli and his crew were infected with [[Vira606]], a virus created by the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]]. Since only the Empire held the cure, the pirates had to obey or die.<ref name="Orbit" />

The Terrors entered the [[Ringali Shell]] with a vengeance, attacking civilian shipping at [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]], [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] and [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]], and committing various small atrocities. They claimed to be [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] working for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. As Kenit intended, their ruthlessness drew the ''Far Orbit'' into [[Battle of the Solar Terrors|battle]]. However, the plan failed, and the ''Far Orbit'' destroyed the Solar Terrors and escaped.<ref name="Orbit" />
